$comment: AI-model catalog for the 'ultra' tier — 48-96GB-class WORKSTATION GPUs above the 5090's 32GB 'max' tier (RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell 96GB, RTX 6000 Ada / A6000 48GB, RTX PRO 5000 48/72GB, AMD Radeon PRO W7900 48GB, or 2x homogeneous cards pooled). The win over 'max': 70B run FULLY in VRAM (no CPU offload) at 48GB; 96GB adds Q8 70B, dense 123B, gpt-oss-120B MoE, and Command-R+ 104B resident. Models with min_vram_gb only fit ~96GB (or 2x48 pooled) — distro-ai-model/-detect-tier gate them by detected VRAM. DATACENTER GPUs (H100/H200/B200/MI300X/Gaudi) route to Server mode, not this tier. Runtime is Ollama; each 'repo' is an exact ollama.com tag (pinned, never ':latest'). Tags verified 2026-07-16.

qwen2.5-coder-32b.name: Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct
qwen2.5-coder-32b.note: Best coder; leaves ample room on 48GB for large context.

llama3.3-70b.name: Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct
llama3.3-70b.note: The headline ultra win: 42.5GB fits FULLY in a 48GB card's VRAM — no CPU offload (unlike the max tier). Full GPU speed.

llama3.3-70b-q8.name: Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct (Q8_0, near-fp16 quality)
llama3.3-70b-q8.note: 96GB-class only. Q8_0 ~75GB resident for near-fp16 quality.

gpt-oss-120b.name: OpenAI gpt-oss-120b (MoE, 117B/5.1B active, native MXFP4)
gpt-oss-120b.note: 96GB single card (or 2x48 pooled). Ships natively in MXFP4 (~65GB) — that IS the ollama gpt-oss:120b tag, no separate quant to pick.

qwen3-32b.name: Qwen3-32B (reasoning)
qwen3-32b.note: Balanced general model; fits 48GB with room for large context.

deepseek-r1-70b.name: DeepSeek-R1 70B (distill, reasoning)
deepseek-r1-70b.note: Best know-it-all; ~43GB fits FULLY on a 48GB card — no offload.

deepseek-r1-32b.name: DeepSeek-R1 32B (distill, reasoning)
deepseek-r1-32b.note: Balanced reasoner; fits any ultra card with headroom.

mistral-large-123b.name: Mistral-Large-Instruct-2411 (123B dense)
mistral-large-123b.note: 96GB-class. Q4_K_M ~73GB fits a single 96GB card fully.

dolphin-mixtral-8x7b.name: Dolphin 2.7 Mixtral 8x7B (uncensored MoE)
dolphin-mixtral-8x7b.note: Uncensored MoE; fits 48GB comfortably (unlike the max tier where it was at the edge of 32GB).

qwen3-30b-a3b.name: Qwen3-30B-A3B-Instruct (MoE)
qwen3-30b-a3b.note: Capable desktop assistant; MoE (~3B active) stays fast.

qwen2.5vl-72b.name: Qwen2.5-VL-72B-Instruct (vision)
qwen2.5vl-72b.note: Largest supported vision model. Weights (~47GB) + projector + KV are too tight for a bare 48GB card driving a display, so min_vram_gb=48 makes 'use vision' auto-fall-back to VL-32B there; it auto-selects on 96GB / 2x48 pooled. Load it explicitly (use vision best) to force it on 48GB.

qwen2.5vl-32b.name: Qwen2.5-VL-32B-Instruct (vision)
qwen2.5vl-32b.note: Lighter vision option; fits 48GB with headroom. Pulls its projector automatically.

flux1-dev.name: FLUX.1-dev
flux1-dev.note: Best image gen. GATED (HF token). ComfyUI on 8188, ample VRAM headroom on ultra.

flux1-schnell.name: FLUX.1-schnell (fp8)
flux1-schnell.note: Apache-2.0, no token. Default when no HF token.
